luma.dashboard.empty: Lumi could not find a workspace for this world yet.
luma.dashboard.workspace_hint: Lumi tracks this world automatically. Open Build History, name a branch, and build.
luma.dashboard.workspace_help: Open the active Build History for this dimension to save builds, inspect history, or recover work.
luma.dashboard.workspace_recovery: %s tracked block changes are waiting in the recovery draft.
luma.dashboard.other_workspaces_help: These workspaces belong to the same world but a different dimension.
luma.dashboard.workspace_empty_versions: Nothing is saved yet. Build first, then save before trying risky changes.
luma.dashboard.workspace_pending: %s unsaved block changes are ready to save.
luma.dashboard.workspace_ready: Everything saved. Keep building or open a branch.
luma.project.workspace_hint: This workspace quietly tracks what you changed in the current dimension.
luma.project.pending_changes_hint: %s unsaved changes are waiting in branch %s.
luma.project.no_versions_hint: No saves yet. Build freely, then save when you want a rollback point.
luma.project.selected_branch_inactive: This is not the current branch. Switch to it if you want new saves or restores here.
luma.project.pending_help: New world edits are recorded on the current branch: %s.
luma.project.branches_help: Branches let you try another direction without touching your current build.
luma.project.branch_create_from_selected: The new branch will start from this save: %s.
luma.project.history_story_help: Big cards are the easiest way to browse saves. Open details only when you need to inspect one closely.
luma.project.graph_help: Use this only when you need the full ancestry view.
luma.project.history_search_help: Search by name, author, or save id.
luma.project.diagnostics_help: Rare checks and technical details stay here until you need them.
luma.project.integrity_clean: No integrity warnings or errors were found.
luma.project.integrations_help: Availability and capability summary for supported external tools.
luma.project.log_help: Recent recovery and restore events for this project.
luma.restore.initial_confirm_help: This moves the current branch to the initial save and starts the restore.
luma.restore.initial_confirm_warning: Warning: this may remove tracked changes in the affected area.
luma.restore.confirm_help: This will change blocks in the current build.
luma.restore.confirm_safety: Safety save will be created first when there is unsaved work.
luma.history.quick_save_hint: Write a short note so you can recognize this save later.
luma.history.card_current_summary: This is the latest save for branch %s.
luma.history.card_start_summary: This is where this branch starts.
luma.history.card_manual_summary: Saved by hand so you can return to it.
luma.history.card_recovery_summary: Recovered from interrupted play so work would not be lost.
luma.history.card_restore_summary: Created around a restore so you can safely move backward.
luma.history.card_legacy_summary: Imported from an older Lumi history format.
luma.history.empty_branch: This branch does not have saves matching the current filter.
luma.variant.creation_hint: Name a branch. Leave the base blank to start from the current latest save%s
luma.log.legacy_notice: This project was loaded from the legacy snapshot-only format.
luma.log.empty: No recovery or restore events recorded yet.
luma.recovery.draft_present: Recovered work: %s tracked changes in branch %s
luma.recovery.summary_help: Lumi found work that was not saved before the game closed.
luma.recovery.summary_behavior: You can put it back into the world, turn it into a normal save, or delete it.
luma.recovery.actions_help: Pick the safe next step for this recovered work.
luma.recovery.save_help: Save it as a normal save in the current branch.
luma.recovery.restore_help: Restore it back into the world without creating a save first.
luma.recovery.discard_help: Remove the recovered work without applying it back into the world.
luma.recovery.discard_extra_help: Discard draft: forget the stored unsaved changes completely.
luma.changes.no_version: Select a version to inspect changes.
luma.changes.no_parent: This version has no parent diff to inspect.
luma.changes.empty: No changed blocks were recorded for this diff.
luma.changes.more: %s more changed blocks are not shown.
luma.preview.no_version: Select a version to inspect its preview.
luma.preview.help: Isometric snapshot for the selected save. Lumi auto-frames the touched area so you can recognize the build before compare or restore.
luma.preview.unavailable: This version does not have a generated preview yet.
luma.preview.missing_file: The preview metadata exists, but the preview file is missing.
luma.preview.load_failed: The preview file could not be loaded on the client.
luma.preview.refresh_help: Refresh preview queues a new textured isometric capture for this save area.
luma.materials.no_version: Select a version to inspect the material delta.
luma.materials.empty: No material delta is available for the selected version.
luma.materials.more: %s more material entries are not shown.
luma.integrations.empty: No integration status entries are available.
luma.compare.left_help: Enter a save id, branch id, or `current` for the current build.
luma.compare.right_help: Enter a save id, branch id, or `current` for the current build.
luma.compare.preset_help: Use presets to avoid typing ids manually.
luma.compare.setup_help: Pick two saves, branches, or the current build.
luma.compare.blocks_help: Showing up to %s changed block entries.
luma.compare.variants_hint: You can also enter branch ids: %s
luma.compare.empty: Choose two references or use the presets above to start comparing.
luma.create_project.name: Project name
luma.settings.capture_help: Tune how Lumi closes active tracked edit sessions.
luma.settings.safety_help: Control how Lumi protects your build before restore actions.
luma.settings.safety_snapshot_help: Save the current build before restoring an older save.
luma.settings.preview_generation_help: Create isometric preview images when saves are made.
luma.settings.performance_help: Tune how Lumi closes idle tracked edit sessions.
luma.settings.idle_seconds_help: How long tracked edits may stay idle before Lumi closes the current change session.
luma.settings.storage_help: Control full-save cadence and storage volume policy.
luma.settings.snapshot_every_help: Create a full storage copy after this many saves.
luma.settings.snapshot_volume_help: Create a full storage copy when the changed volume becomes large enough.
luma.settings.snapshot_mode_hint: Full storage copies are automatic for reliability.
luma.settings.preview_help: Preview generation is optional and does not block saving.
luma.settings.hud_help: Control the persistent in-world Lumi panel.
luma.settings.workspace_hud_help: Hide this if you only want menu and hotkey feedback.
luma.settings.debug_help: Verbose tracing for capture, save, restore, compare, HUD, and background operations.
luma.settings.debug_logging_help: Write detailed runtime logs for this workspace. You can also force it globally with `-Dlumi.debug=true`.
luma.settings.project_state_help: These flags only change how the project appears in menus.
luma.settings.archive_help: Hide this workspace from the main dashboard list.
luma.settings.diagnostics_help: Read-only checks for project integrity live here.
luma.settings.save_help: All settings and project flags are saved together.
luma.settings.error_positive_int: Enter a whole number greater than zero.
luma.settings.error_positive_decimal: Enter a number greater than zero.
luma.status.singleplayer_only: This workflow is currently supported in local singleplayer only.
luma.status.admin_required: Lumi requires operator rights or cheats enabled in this world.
luma.status.project_open_failed: Lumi could not open the current workspace.
luma.status.project_failed: Workspace data could not be loaded.
luma.status.restore_started: Restore started. Lumi is applying blocks in the background.
luma.status.partial_restore_started: Partial restore started. Lumi is applying the selected region.
luma.status.partial_restore_invalid_boun: Partial restore bounds must be valid numbers.
luma.status.undo_started: Undo started. Lumi is rolling back the latest tracked action.
luma.status.redo_started: Redo started. Lumi is replaying the latest tracked action.
luma.status.undo_unavailable: There is no tracked Lumi action to undo here.
luma.status.redo_unavailable: There is no tracked Lumi action to redo here.
luma.status.initial_restore_confirmation: Confirm restore to Initial before Lumi changes the world.
luma.status.restore_confirmation_require: Confirm restore before Lumi changes the world.
luma.status.variant_already_exists: A branch with that name already exists.
luma.status.variant_base_missing: The selected save no longer exists.
luma.status.variant_switch_requires_save: Save or discard the current recovery draft before switching branches.
luma.status.quick_save_ready: Name this save, then save it to the current workspace.
luma.status.no_changes_to_save: There are no unsaved changes to save.
luma.status.draft_restore_started: Recovery draft restore started. Lumi is applying blocks in the background.
luma.status.world_operation_busy: Another world operation is already running.
luma.status.settings_invalid: Fix the invalid fields before Lumi can save settings.
luma.status.create_ready: Create a project by entering bounds and a name.
luma.status.history_imported: History package imported as a review project.
luma.status.merge_preview_loading: Building combine review in the background.
luma.status.merge_conflicts_found: Same-area changes were found. Review the overlap before applying anything.
luma.status.merge_no_changes: There is nothing new to combine from this imported branch.
luma.status.merge_started: Combine started. Lumi is writing the combined save in the background.
luma.status.cleanup_ready: Inspect unused files before cleaning up.
luma.status.save_started: Save started. Lumi is writing save data in the background.
luma.status.amend_started: Replace latest save started. Lumi is updating history in the background.
luma.status.recovery_save_started: Recovery save started. Lumi is writing save data in the background.

luma.window.home_help: Choose the next step for this build.
luma.simple.next_title: What do you want to do?
luma.simple.next_clean_help: Everything is saved. You can keep building, look at saved moments, or try another branch.
luma.simple.next_dirty_help: %s block changes are waiting. Save them when you want a safe moment to return to.
luma.simple.save_help: Save what the build looks like now so you can come back later.
luma.simple.save_clean_help: Build a little first. When blocks change, this button keeps that moment.
luma.simple.restore_help: Return the world to the latest saved moment: %s.
luma.simple.restore_empty_help: Make a saved moment first, then Lumi can bring it back.
luma.simple.saved_short_help: Look through the moments you kept for this build.
luma.simple.idea_picker_help: Pick a branch to see its saves.
luma.simple.ideas_help: Make or open another branch without losing this one.
luma.simple.share_help: Move build history packages in or out of this world.
luma.simple.no_saved_help: Build first, then press Save build when you want a safe return point.
luma.build.status_clean: No changes since the last save.
luma.build.status_dirty: Unsaved changes are ready to save.
luma.build.idea_picker_help: Pick a branch to see its saves.
luma.build.no_saves_help: Save your build before trying risky changes.
luma.more.title: More
luma.more.help: Rare tools live here so the main build screen stays focused.
luma.more.projects_help: Open another build history when selection is needed.
luma.more.import_export_help: Move build history packages in or out of this world.
luma.more.settings_help: Safety, preview, storage, performance, and debug options.
luma.more.cleanup_help: Inspect unused files before deleting anything.
luma.more.diagnostics_help: Support checks, integrations, and recent logs.
luma.more.advanced_help: Manual compare, raw references, history graph, and legacy tools.
luma.advanced.help: Technical tools for users who know exactly what they need.
luma.advanced.actions_help: Manual and legacy workflows are intentionally separate from normal building.
luma.advanced.legacy_project_help: Track only a selected area instead of the whole dimension. Use this only if you know why you need it.
luma.advanced.raw_refs_help: Internal names and ids for support/debug.
luma.diagnostics.help: Run support checks away from the normal build workflow.
luma.diagnostics.logs_help: Recent recovery and operation journal entries.
luma.cleanup.actions_help: Always inspect first. Clean up is enabled only after a dry run finds candidates.
luma.project.build_clean_help: Everything from this build is already saved.
luma.project.build_dirty_help: These changes are ready to save or compare.
luma.project.recovery_hint: Unsaved work is already protected if the game closes now.
luma.project.more_help: Rare tools stay here until you need them.
luma.save.empty_help: Build a bit more, then come back when you want a restore point.
luma.save.summary_help: Lumi saves the current build state in this dimension.
luma.save.name_help: Describe what you are about to keep.
luma.quick_save.name_help: Name the restore point you are creating now.
luma.save.suggestions_help: Use one if it fits, or write your own.
luma.save.more_help: Less common save tools stay here.
luma.save.replace_help: Replace the latest save in this branch: %s
luma.save.replace_unavailable: Replace latest save becomes available when this branch already has a latest save.
luma.save_details.changes_help: Use this to understand what this save would bring back.
luma.save_details.more_help: Advanced actions and raw info stay here.
luma.save_details.advanced_info_help: Material details and raw ids for support/debug.
luma.partial_restore.title: Restore selected area
luma.partial_restore.help: Restore only the selected bounds and save the result as a new save.
luma.variants.overview_help: Use branches when you want to try another direction without risking the current one.
luma.variants.create_help: The new branch will start from %s.
luma.variants.name_help: Name the branch you want to try.
luma.variants.list_help: Switch when you want to continue another direction.
luma.variants.no_head: No saves yet in this branch.
luma.ideas.overview_help: Try another direction without risking the current build.
luma.ideas.create_help: The new branch will start from %s.
luma.ideas.name_help: Name the branch you want to try.
luma.ideas.list_help: Switch when you want to continue another direction.
luma.ideas.no_saves: No saves yet in this branch.
luma.share.title: Import / Export
luma.share.help: Export a branch as a portable history package, import a shared package for review, then combine it with a local branch when the overlap is safe.
luma.share.export_help: Create a package for the selected branch. You can upload or send that zip outside Lumi.
luma.share.import_help: Drop shared package zips into lumi-projects or enter an absolute path. Lumi brings each package in as a review project first.
luma.share.package_folder_help: Lumi reads and writes portable history packages from the game-root lumi-projects folder.
luma.share.package_files_help: These zip files are ready to import into this build for review.
luma.share.package_files_empty: No package zips found in this folder yet.
luma.share.packages_help: Review imported history packages here, then combine them with a local branch when the overlap is understood.
luma.share.merge_help: Choose the local target branch, review overlap, and combine only when the same-area changes are understood.
luma.share.imported_empty: No imported history packages are available for this build yet.
luma.share.merge_preview_loading: Lumi is comparing the imported branch with the selected local branch.
luma.share.merge_conflicts: Same area changed in both branches: %s blocks across %s chunks.
luma.share.merge_no_changes: The imported branch does not add any new changes on top of this target.
luma.share.merge_unresolved_help: Pick a choice for every same-area zone before applying the combine.
luma.share.merge_ready: Ready to combine %s imported block changes.
luma.compare.more_help: Materials, areas, and advanced compare stay here.
luma.compare.manual_help: Advanced: compare two raw save references manually.
luma.compare.hotkey_hint: H: show/hide highlight | hold overlay key: x-ray highlight
luma.workspace.opening_help: Lumi is preparing workspace metadata in the background.
luma.recovery.message_help: Optional note for the new save.
luma.recovery.found_help: Lumi found unsaved work from the last session.
luma.recovery.restore_confirm_help: This will put the recovered changes back into the world.
luma.recovery.delete_confirm_warning: Recovered work will be permanently removed.
